task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS home dashboard or patient search screen is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the correct patient chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or dashboard for 'Eliseo Nader' (DOB: 1973-05-31) is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the medications section and opened the form to add a new medication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Medication', 'Prescribe', or 'Order' form/modal is open within the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct drug name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Aspirin' is typed or selected in the medication/drug name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct dose, frequency, and route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dose field shows '81' (with 'mg' selected), the frequency shows 'Once daily' (or similar like 'daily'), and the route shows 'Oral' (or 'mouth').

task_completion.description: Verify the medication was successfully saved to the patient's active medications list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active medications list or order summary for Eliseo Nader explicitly displays 'Aspirin' with the details '81 mg', 'Once daily', and 'Oral'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenMRS SPA (http://localhost/openmrs/spa) rather than API testing tools like Postman.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, SQL inserts, or direct database manipulation scripts being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the final result is within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final confirmation of the medication must appear within the structured OpenMRS patient dashboard UI, not in a text editor or a manually edited HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Eliseo Nader. Patient DOB: 1973-05-31. Expected Drug: Aspirin. Expected Dose: 81 mg. Expected Frequency: Once daily (keywords: daily, once). Expected Route: Oral (keywords: oral, mouth).
